location: On a corpse on a rocky outcropping near a Sorcery Scarab, along the right-hand wall shortly after entering Caria Manor in northern Liurnia of the Lakes.

source.name: Corpse near Sorcery Scarab, Caria Manor entrance

tactics: Fingercreepers (grasping, spider-like hands) ambush along the same wall on the way in — fight them in the open rather than letting them corner and grab you.
Caria Manor is reachable early via a hidden tunnel connecting Limgrave and Liurnia, so low-level characters can grab this shield well ahead of the manor's normal progression point.
A Sorcery Scarab (a crafting pickup) sits right beside the shield's corpse — easy to grab both at once.
lore: A frost-touched crest said to originate with a Carian princess. Its enchantment is faint, but it grants extra magic damage negation along with resistance to frost.

builds.name: Magic-resistant caster off-hand
builds.why: Only 9 Strength required alongside the best magic negation of any small shield makes it a strong pick for casters worried about mage matchups without wanting to invest in a block stat.
